text.title: Solo Content Calendar Template Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Solo Content Calendar Template output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: exactly 12 rows with week_iso + pain_ref + asset_type + channel + status

forbidden.pattern: any row missing pain_ref OR channel OR target_keyword/hook
any row pinned to a pain not in current top-5

allowed-transformations.transformation: Allowed to mark a row 'backfill' when next week's row is not drafted by Friday EOD.
Allowed to retire a row at quarterly review if pain_ref dropped from top-5.

list.item: Every required field populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
